vocab.example: Team sports are deeply ingrained in our society because they perfectly reflect the communal spirit of our people.
Major football tournaments have a unique power to unify the nation, bringing people from all walks of life together.

vocab.meaning: năng lực/sự thành thạo trong thể thao
vocab.example: Many young individuals strive to showcase their sporting prowess in local basketball leagues to gain recognition.

vocab.meaning: cấp độ cơ sở/quần chúng (từ gốc rễ)
vocab.example: At a grassroots level, you can see children playing volleyball in almost every neighborhood park every afternoon.

vocab.meaning: lượng người hâm mộ cuồng nhiệt (như một giáo phái)
vocab.example: Certain regional football clubs have developed a cultish following, with fans traveling hundreds of miles to support them.
Parents often encourage team sports because they help instill discipline and a sense of responsibility in their children.

vocab.meaning: trạng thái cực kỳ phấn khích/náo nhiệt
vocab.example: Excitement reaches a fever pitch whenever the national team competes in international arenas.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thuộc về một nơi nào đó/tập thể
vocab.example: Being part of a local cricket team provides many individuals with a vital sense of belonging and social support.

vocab.meaning: việc phát sóng vào khung giờ vàng
vocab.example: Team sports dominate prime-time coverage on national television, highlighting their immense popularity.

vocab.meaning: nằm ở trung tâm/là phần quan trọng nhất của
vocab.example: Competitive sports are at the heart of our school curriculum, fostering both physical health and teamwork.
